milestoneTitle: Phase M9.6b — Pin-to-learn modal on Tools cards. Each tool's detail modal now carries a collapsed <details> "Pin this tool to Learn →" with two fields (What do you want to learn? — required, Notes — optional). Submit (or Enter on the prompt input) writes a draft stub to clhub.v1.learnDrafts — { id, learnPrompt, notes, docsUrl, sourceToolId, createdAt } — forward-compatible with Q13's future LLM hydrator. Drafts render in Learn's Everything else zone with a Draft pill, pickable by the same filter/sort/DnD machinery; click opens the tool's docs URL in a new tab. Draft-specific ⋯ menu adds "Remove this draft" alongside the pin toggle, which cascades through unpin + unset-mastery so stale state doesn't linger. Unified pin/mastery helpers gained a "draft" type (prefix learndraft: for saves, draft: for mastery). data/schema.md updated with the learnDrafts shape.
